definitions.text: Something said or done for amusement, not in seriousness.
A laughably worthless thing or person; a sham.
examples: Your effort at cleaning your room is a joke.

definitions.text: To do or say something for amusement rather than seriously.
examples: I didn’t mean what I said — I was only joking.

definitions.text: (intransitive, followed by with) To dupe in a friendly manner for amusement; to mess with, play with.
examples: Relax, man, I'm just joking with you.

definitions.text: To make merry with; to make jokes upon; to rally.
